drakloak_recon_directive.policy: Select the highest route-value card from current.looking; bottom the lowest route-value remainder. Each Drakloak is activated independently once per turn.

dragapult_phantom_dive.policy: Resolve six separate ten-damage-counter target decisions; prioritize immediate KO and future Cursed Blast Prize bands without overdamage.

rare_candy.option_contract: EVOLVE option contains Stage 2 area/index and Basic inPlayArea/inPlayIndex
rare_candy.policy: Prefer an attack-ready Dragapult; permit Dusknoir only for a positive Prize route.

crispin.policy: Leave the most urgent missing color available for immediate attachment and put the other color into hand.

cinderace_turbo_flare.policy: Select only Energy that completes colored Dragapult routes; never dump redundant Energy on a ready body.
